title: Rumah Kaliurang
overview: Five friends vacation plans turned into a disaster when trapped in a mysterious house in Kaliurang, which is located at the foot of Mount Merapi. The house that was supposed to be a place to stay was actually holding grudges and anger. Will they be able to return home safely?  Brama, Kinan, Anom, Aji and Rani who decided to rest in a comfortable house on the way, realized that they were trapped in something terrible.
